parameters.name: xord
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: The menu attached to this parameter allows you to specify the order in which the changes to your will take place. Changing the Transform order will change where things go much the same way as going a

parameters.name: tunit
parameters.label: Translate Unit
parameters.description: Sets the units used in the Translate parameter.

parameters.name: rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: The field for rotation allows you to specify the amount of rotation of the image.

parameters.name: punit
parameters.label: Pivot Unit
parameters.description: Sets the units used in the Pivot parameter.

parameters.name: premultrgbbyalpha
parameters.label: Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha
parameters.description: This option allows the Background Color to be pre-multiplied by alpha.

parameters.name: compover
parameters.label: Comp Over Background Color
parameters.description: Fill any area with the background color if it has alpha less than 1.

parameters.name: mipmapbias
parameters.label: Mipmap Bias
parameters.description: If the input is sampled using mipmapping, this applies a bias to which mip level(s) are used when sampling the texture. 0 means the levels that would be normally used. Negative will selected higher le

parameters.name: extend
parameters.label: Extend
parameters.description: This parameter determines what happens at the edges of the tiles.

parameters.name: limittiles
parameters.label: Limit Tiles
parameters.description: Turn this On to limit the number of tiles in the U and V directions using the parameters below.

parameters.name: py
parameters.label: Py
parameters.description: The Pivot point edit fields allow you to define the point about which the TOP scales and rotates. Altering the pivot point of a TOP produces different results depending on the transformation performed

parameters.name: tilev2
parameters.label: Tilev2
parameters.description: The first Tile V parameter sets the number of tiles to repeat on the botttom of the source image. The second Tile V parameter sets the number of tiles to repeat on the top of the source image. The ima

parameters.name: growshrinky
parameters.label: Growshrinky
parameters.description: Grow/Shrink is a scale that is given in pixel units. A positive value will cause the image to grow that many pixels while a negative will cause the image to shrink that many pixels.

parameters.name: tileu2
parameters.label: Tileu2
parameters.description: The first Tile U parameter sets the number of tiles to repeat on the left of the source image. The second Tile U parameter sets the number of tiles to repeat on the right of the source image. The imag

parameters.name: ty
parameters.label: Ty
parameters.description: The two fields for Translate allows you to specify transforms in x and y axes.

parameters.name: sy
parameters.label: Sy
parameters.description: The two fields for Scale allows you to specify transforms in x and y axes.

parameters.name: bgcolora
parameters.label: Bgcolora
parameters.description: Color applied behind the foreground image. The background is visible when the image is translated or scaled down. Try scaling an image down 50% in size (Scale = 0.5,0.5) and setting the background col

examples.label: Configure Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha and Rotate
examples.code:
n = op('transform1')
n.par.premultrgbbyalpha = False
n.par.rotate = 80583
n.par.limittiles = True
examples.description: Common settings from 69 real Derivative examples

examples.label: Read Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha value
